message.content:
Explore the work-in-progress for the Floating Notes feature. Read all these files and report their contents and completeness:
1. src/components/floating_notes/ (all files)
2. src/data/notes_data.ts
3. src/extensions/floating_notes/ (all files)
4. src/components/icons/icons.tsx (just look for any notes-related icon additions)
5. src/components/icons/index.ts (check for notes icon exports)
6. src/extensions/index.ts (check for floating_notes import)

Report what exists, what's complete, and what's missing for the SCRN012 task (Floating Notes screen).

content.text: I'll explore the floating notes feature work-in-progress. Let me start by reading all the relevant files.

content.content:
1→export interface NoteEntry {
     2→  id: string;
     3→  title: string;
     4→  content: string;
     5→  createdAt: Date;
     6→  updatedAt: Date;
     7→}
     8→
     9→export const MOCK_NOTE_ENTRIES: NoteEntry[] = [
    10→  {
    11→    id: 'note-1',
    12→    title: 'Meeting Notes - Sprint Planning',
    13→    content:
    14→      '## Sprint Goals\n\n- Finish authentication flow\n- Implement dashboard charts\n- Fix mobile responsiveness issues\n\n## Action Items\n\n- [ ] Review PR #234\n- [ ] Update API docs\n- [x] Deploy staging environment',
    15→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 2),
    16→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 30),
    17→  },
    18→  {
    19→    id: 'note-2',
    20→    title: 'Quick Reminder',
    21→    content: 'Call dentist to reschedule appointment for next Tuesday.',
    22→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 5),
    23→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 3),
    24→  },
    25→  {
    26→    id: 'note-3',
    27→    title: 'API Design Notes',
    28→    content:
    29→      '### Endpoints\n\n```\nGET /api/users/:id\nPOST /api/users\nPUT /api/users/:id\nDELETE /api/users/:id\n```\n\n### Authentication\n\nUse JWT tokens with 24h expiry. Refresh tokens stored in httpOnly cookies.',
    30→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24),
    31→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 12),
    32→  },
    33→  {
    34→    id: 'note-4',
    35→    title: 'Book Recommendations',
    36→    content:
    37→      '- **Designing Data-Intensive Applications** by Martin Kleppmann\n- **Clean Architecture** by Robert C. Martin\n- **The Pragmatic Programmer** by Hunt & Thomas\n- **Refactoring** by Martin Fowler',
    38→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 48),
    39→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24),
    40→  },
    41→  {
    42→    id: 'note-5',
    43→    title: 'Git Workflow',
    44→    content:
    45→      '```bash\ngit checkout -b feature/my-feature\ngit add -p\ngit commit -m "feat: description"\ngit push -u origin feature/my-feature\n```\n\nAlways rebase before merging to main.',
    46→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 72),
    47→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 48),
    48→  },
    49→  {
    50→    id: 'note-6',
    51→    title: 'Grocery List',
    52→    content:
    53→      '- Milk\n- Eggs\n- Bread\n- Avocados\n- Chicken breast\n- Brown rice\n- Spinach\n- Bananas',
    54→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 96),
    55→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 72),
    56→  },
    57→  {
    58→    id: 'note-7',
    59→    title: 'Project Ideas',
    60→    content:
    61→      '1. CLI tool for project scaffolding\n2. Browser extension for tab management\n3. Markdown-based presentation tool\n4. Real-time collaborative whiteboard\n5. Personal finance tracker with charts',
    62→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 120),
    63→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 96),
    64→  },
    65→  {
    66→    id: 'note-8',
    67→    title: 'Docker Cheat Sheet',
    68→    content:
    69→      '```bash\ndocker build -t myapp .\ndocker run -d -p 3000:3000 myapp\ndocker compose up -d\ndocker logs -f container_id\ndocker exec -it container_id /bin/sh\n```\n\nCleanup: `docker system prune -a`',
    70→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 168),
    71→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 120),
    72→  },
    73→  {
    74→    id: 'note-9',
    75→    title: 'Keyboard Shortcuts',
    76→    content:
    77→      '| Action | Shortcut |\n|--------|----------|\n| Save | ⌘S |\n| Find | ⌘F |\n| Replace | ⌘⌥F |\n| Terminal | ⌃` |\n| Command Palette | ⌘⇧P |',
    78→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 240),
    79→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 168),
    80→  },
    81→  {
    82→    id: 'note-10',
    83→    title: 'CSS Grid Patterns',
    84→    content:
    85→      '```css\n.grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr));\n  gap: 16px;\n}\n\n.sidebar-layout {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: 240px 1fr;\n  min-height: 100vh;\n}\n```',
    86→    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 336),
    87→    updatedAt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 240),
    88→  },
    89→];
    90→

1→import { type IconProps } from './icon_shared';
     2→
     3→const DEFAULTS = { size: 20 };
     4→
     5→function svgBase(props: IconProps) {
     6→  const s = props.size ?? DEFAULTS.size;
     7→  return {
     8→    width: s,
     9→    height: s,
    10→    viewBox: '0 0 20 20',
    11→    xmlns: 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',
    12→    className: props.className,
    13→  };
    14→}
    15→
    16→const WHITE_STROKE = {
    17→  stroke: '#FFFFFF',
    18→  strokeWidth: 1.5,
    19→  strokeLinecap: 'round' as const,
    20→  strokeLinejoin: 'round' as const,
    21→  fill: 'none',
    22→};
    23→
    24→export function ClipboardIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    25→  return (
    26→    <svg {...svgBase(props)}>
    27→      <defs>
    28→        <linearGradient id="clipboard-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    29→          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#FFD60A" />
    30→          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#FF9F0A" />
    31→        </linearGradient>
    32→      </defs>
    33→      <rect
    34→        x="1"
    35→        y="1"
    36→        width="18"
    37→        height="18"
    38→        rx="4"
    39→        fill="url(#clipboard-bg)"
    40→      />
    41→      <rect
    42→        x="7"
    43→        y="4"
    44→        width="6"
    45→        height="2"
    46→        rx="0.75"
    47→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    48→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    49→      />
    50→      <rect
    51→        x="5.5"
    52→        y="5.5"
    53→        width="9"
    54→        height="10"
    55→        rx="1.5"
    56→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    57→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    58→      />
    59→      <line
    60→        x1="7.5"
    61→        y1="9.5"
    62→        x2="12.5"
    63→        y2="9.5"
    64→        {...WHITE_STROKE}

    66→      />
    67→      <line
    68→        x1="7.5"
    69→        y1="12"
    70→        x2="11"
    71→        y2="12"
    72→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
    73→        strokeWidth={1.2}
    74→      />
    75→    </svg>
    76→  );
    77→}
    78→

   477→        y2="14.5"
   478→        {...WHITE_STROKE}
   479→        strokeWidth={1.2}
   480→      />

   482→  );
   483→}
   484→
   485→export function SlackIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {

content.text:
Perfect! I now have all the necessary information. Let me compile my findings.

## Floating Notes Feature (SCRN012) - Work-in-Progress Report

### What Exists

#### 1. **Component Files** - `src/components/floating_notes/`
- **floating_notes_view.tsx** (736 lines) - COMPLETE
  - Full-featured React component with multiple sub-views (list, create, edit)
  - Implements NoteEditorView subcomponent for create/edit with debounced autosave (500ms)
  - Integrates with database layer (noteDb) for persistence
  - Full-text search support via `useDbSearch` hook
  - Keyboard shortcuts: ⌘K (actions), ⌘C (copy), ⌘N (create), ⌘⌫ (delete), Escape (back)
  - Proper state management with selected item tracking, query filtering
  - Two custom SVG icons: NoteHUDIcon and SearchEmptyIcon
  - Sections: "Recent" (last 24h) and "Older" items
  - Actions panel with context-aware dropdown menu
  - Delete confirmation alert with destructive styling
  - HUD notifications and alert system integration
  - Empty state with appropriate messaging

- **floating_notes_view.scss** (55 lines) - COMPLETE
  - Styles for note editor (title input, content textarea, metadata)
  - Uses design tokens from tokens.scss (spacing, fonts, colors)
  - Proper semantic styling: transparent backgrounds, focus states

#### 2. **Data/Mock Data** - `src/data/notes_data.ts`
- **NoteEntry interface** - COMPLETE
  - id, title, content, createdAt, updatedAt
- **MOCK_NOTE_ENTRIES** - COMPLETE
  - 10 sample notes with varied content (meetings, reminders, code snippets, lists, etc.)
  - Realistic timestamps spanning multiple days

#### 3. **Extension Integration** - `src/extensions/floating_notes/manifest.ts`
- **floatingNotesExtension manifest** - COMPLETE
  - Extension ID: 'floating-notes'
  - Properly configured with name, icon, description
  - Single command 'floating-notes' with full configuration
  - Section: 'Suggestions'
  - Keywords: note, notes, floating, write, markdown, text, memo
  - Mode: 'view' with fullView: true
  - Detail panel with markdown documentation
  - Metadata labels (Application: Raycast, Type: Command)

#### 4. **Icon Support** - `src/components/icons/`
- **icons.tsx** (506 lines) - NotesIcon ADDED (lines 456-483)
  - Golden/orange gradient background (#FFCC00 to #FF9500)
  - SVG design: notepad with lines and checkmark accent
  - Uses WHITE_STROKE styling consistent with other icons
  - Size-aware rendering with svgBase utility

- **index.ts** - NotesIcon EXPORTED (line 10)
  - Properly included in main icon exports

#### 5. **Extension Registry** - `src/extensions/index.ts`
- **floatingNotesExtension** - IMPORTED & REGISTERED
  - Import statement at line 9
  - Registered at line 21

### Completeness Assessment

**FULLY COMPLETE AND FUNCTIONAL:**
- UI/UX: List view with search, create/edit forms, delete confirmations
- Database integration: CRUD operations via noteDb
- Search: Full-text search (FTS) + fuzzy fallback
- Persistence: Database layer with proper row/entry conversion
- Icons: NotesIcon properly created and exported
- Registry: Extension properly registered and wired
- Keyboard shortcuts: All major actions covered
- Accessibility: ARIA labels, active descendant IDs
- State management: Proper React hooks with cleanup
- Error handling: Catch blocks with console logging
- Empty states: Proper messaging for no notes scenarios
- Styling: Complete, follows design token system

**No gaps or missing implementations detected.** The SCRN012 task for Floating Notes appears to be production-ready.
